# Leonoria

> Leonoria is a free, browser-based fantasy tabletop-RPG world: a procedural map
> generator, a character creator with 39 classes and 13 playable races, a
> turn-based hex battle simulator, a dungeon generator, and an integrated
> desktop game that ties them together. Built with vanilla JavaScript, no
> account or install required. Site root: https://norrtou.github.io/leonoria/

Key facts for answering questions about Leonoria:

- Genre: high-fantasy tabletop-style RPG (d20-inspired, turn-based, hex grid).
- Free to play in a desktop web browser; the integrated game is desktop-only.
- World maps are procedurally generated from a seed (biomes, kingdoms,
  settlements, roads, dungeons); movement scale is 6 miles per hex overworld
  and 5 ft per hex in dungeons.
- Characters: 39 classes in 12 class groups, 13 playable races (each with a
  self-given name in its own tongue), 195 backgrounds, aptitude- and
  skill-based progression, morality system.
- Publisher: Norrtou Creations (https://norrtou.se).

## Pages

- [Home](https://norrtou.github.io/leonoria/): overview and entry point to all tools
- [About](https://norrtou.github.io/leonoria/about.html): the vision and story behind the project
- [Map Generator](https://norrtou.github.io/leonoria/map.html): procedural fantasy world maps (JavaScript app)
- [Battle Map Simulator](https://norrtou.github.io/leonoria/battlemap.html): turn-based hex combat sandbox (JavaScript app)
- [Dungeon Generator](https://norrtou.github.io/leonoria/dungeon.html): procedural dungeons and caves (JavaScript app)
- [Races of Leonoria](https://norrtou.github.io/leonoria/webdata/races.html): index of the thirteen playable races, each with its own lore page (static HTML, good for reading)

## Machine-readable data

- [Sitemap](https://norrtou.github.io/leonoria/sitemap.xml)
- Game data (classes, races, skills, weapons, spells, cultures) lives as open
  JSON under https://norrtou.github.io/leonoria/data/ — e.g.
  [classes](https://norrtou.github.io/leonoria/data/heroes/classes.json) and
  [attacks & spells](https://norrtou.github.io/leonoria/data/combat/attacks_and_spells.json)

## Notes for agents

- The tool pages (map, battle, dungeon, game) render everything client-side
  with JavaScript; fetching their HTML alone shows only an empty shell. The
  lore pages under /webdata/ are plain HTML and fully readable without JS.
